title: dasyglossum mentigerum
side_effects: Dasyglossum mentigerum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. In rare cases, it may cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat, high blood pressure, and even heart palpitations. If not handled and used correctly, dasyglossum mentigerum can also interact negatively with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
